payload.answer: Could not remember the article because the source fetch returned a 404 network error, so there is no verifiable content to store.

entity_resolution.reason: Source fetch failed with 404 network error; no article content was available to extract durable facts.

repair_options: Provide a working URL or pasted article text.
Retry fetching the source if the URL may be temporarily unavailable.
If you want, I can store only the URL and your note as an unresolved reminder, not as article content.
